career.title: Career History
career.subtitle: A record of continuous growth and challenges

aitron.title: SW Researcher · Frontend
aitron.subtitle: Aitron Inc. · Researcher/Team Member
aitron.description: Developing the web dashboard and mobile app frontend for the IoT smart home platform. Handling cross-platform development with React (web) and React Native/Expo (app), implementing Three.js 3D visualization, TanStack-based data management, and real-time device control.
achievements: Web - React + TypeScript IoT dashboard with Zustand/React Query state management
App - React Native + Expo cross-platform mobile app development
Three.js/R3F 3D device visualization and interaction implementation
TanStack Router/Query type-safe routing and data caching

assemble.title: Frontend Developer
assemble.subtitle: Assemble Inc. · Researcher
assemble.description: Led frontend development for public sector web services and smart water management platforms using Vue.js. Worked with Three.js/WebGL 3D visualization, WebSocket real-time data processing, and role-based routing across 6 projects.
achievements: Public water management portal - Role-based routing guard, SEO optimization for Google indexing
Municipal smart water plant - Equipment monitoring/alarm screens, reusable components reducing customization costs
AI smart water management platform - WebSocket real-time data stream & simulation implementation
GPU edge digital twin - Three.js 3D scene/interaction, WebGL rendering optimization
Digital twin carbon map - UI design & prototyping, technology selection guide
Water plant simulator - Scenario-based simulation logic & state transition implementation

training.title: Data Visualization UI Developer Track
training.subtitle: DW Academy · Enterprise Project
training.description: Completed comprehensive frontend development training from HTML, CSS, JavaScript fundamentals to Vue.js and Firebase. Gained collaboration experience through team projects and received the Top Excellence Award.
achievements: 1st team project - HTML/CSS/JS based website development
2nd team project (Raonaria) - Vue.js + Firebase web application
NCS competency unit completion & Top Excellence Award
